svg.title: ASP.NET Core BFF middleware pipeline order
svg.desc: 13-step middleware pipeline from SecurityHeaders at the top to SpaFallback at the bottom, colour-coded by phase: early (red), mid (amber), late (green).

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What security headers should UseSecurityHeaders set and why must it be first in the pipeline?')
g.text: Middleware/ — CSP, HSTS headers on every response

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How should UseCorrelationId generate and propagate trace IDs through OpenTelemetry spans?')
g.text: Middleware/ — stamps X-Correlation-ID on request + response

g.onclick: sendPrompt('When should the BFF use UseDeveloperExceptionPage vs UseExceptionHandler and what does each return to the client?')
sendPrompt('Why should UseHsts and UseHttpsRedirection be prod-only and what happens if you enable them in dev?')
sendPrompt('Should the BFF serve the Angular SPA bundle via UseStaticFiles or let Azure Front Door CDN handle it?')
g.text: SPA bundle — before routing so static hits skip the full pipeline

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Why must UseRouting come before UseCors and UseRateLimiter in ASP.NET Core 7+?')
sendPrompt('Why must UseCors run before UseAuthentication, and what happens to OIDC preflight requests if the order is swapped?')
g.text: before auth — unauthenticated preflight must succeed

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Why is UseRateLimiter placed before UseAuthentication here, and what are the tradeoffs of rate-limiting unauthenticated requests?')
g.text: before auth — returns 429 before identity resolution

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What authentication schemes does UseAuthentication process in the BFF — cookie, OIDC, or both?')
sendPrompt('What authorization policies should the BFF enforce — are all endpoints protected or only /api/proxy/**?')
sendPrompt('Why are health endpoints mapped before MapControllers, and should /health/live be anonymous?')
sendPrompt('Which controllers are mapped here and what routes do AuthController, ProxyController, and AntiForgeryController own?')
sendPrompt('Why must MapSpaFallback be absolutely last and what happens if it is registered before MapControllers?')
